rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation in the literature review, where it is used to broadly support the claim that pre- and postpromotion dip effects have been reinforced by recent work. The citing paper does not give this specific study a distinct conceptual or methodological role in its framework, hypothesis development, or model specification. Instead, its core empirical setup is explicitly built on Van Heerde, Leeflang, and Wittink (2000), not on Pauwels et al. (2002).
